goal: Align QiniuMCPServer truth, docs, and capability evidence with the actual tool surface and remaining gaps.
successCriteria: README, capability truth, and QiniuMCPServer implementation describe the same tool surface and the same deferred items.
Any documented tool or resource capability is either present in code or explicitly marked deferred.
Focused verification covers the updated truth sync path without regressing Node MCP tests.
touchedSurfaces: QiniuMCPServer implementation and node-facing MCP truth
README and COOKBOOK references to QiniuMCPServer tool surface
capability evidence and node MCP verification coverage
explicitlyOutOfScope: Implementing new QiniuMCPServer tools solely to satisfy existing docs

integrationPrerequisites: Wave B foundation/export-coverage-guard is integrated on codex/vnext-integration as 23e8fb9.
NodeMCPHost held-risk wording from Wave A remains the source boundary unless this package explicitly updates it.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: Truth sync itself is local, but any MCP interop proof beyond unit coverage remains environment-gated.
